summary: REGIONAL BANKING DISTRICT MANAGER VICE PRESIDENT Professional Summary Motivated tenured manager with demonstrated knowledge of industry best practices and operations. Proven skills in enhancing productivity, efficiency and bottom-line profits with forward-thinking leadership. Bringing over twenty years of experience in financial , customer service, sales , problem solving field, with over 15 years management experience. Ready to take on a challenging, growth-oriented role to provide fulfillment and professional purpose.
